## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential service exchange and collaboration between No Boring Design and fwd.digital for design and SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital needs design help (website, slides, graphics) and offers SEO services in return](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [No Boring Design can provide design services (\~$9k/month value) for SEO strategy and implementation](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Both parties aim for a mutually beneficial exchange, with fwd.digital guiding SEO strategy and No Boring Design executing](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Kickoff meetings planned for next week to start collaboration on both design and SEO fronts](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)

## Topics

### Current Needs and Offerings

  - [fwd.digital needs:](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [Website improvements (e.g., resources page, product pages)](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [Slide decks, graphics, and other design assets](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
      - [Potential future need: infographics and visual content for articles](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [No Boring Design offers:](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Web design, slide decks, and general design work](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
      - [One request at a time, with standard turnaround times for different asset types](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers:](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [Editorial and programmatic SEO services](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [Complex, AI-assisted content generation workflows with human editing](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)

### SEO Strategy and Implementation

  - [fwd.digital's approach:](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
      - [Uses custom AI agents and workflows for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
      - [Involves human editors for quality control and customization](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
      - [Focuses on programmatic content creation for scale](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [Potential strategies for No Boring Design:](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
      - [Keyword gap analysis vs. competitors (e.g., Superside)](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
      - [Programmatic content creation (e.g., directories, galleries)](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
      - [Leveraging existing content and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)

### Collaboration Framework

  - [Service exchange model:](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [No Boring Design to provide design services (\~$9k/month value)](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
      - [fwd.digital to offer SEO strategy and implementation](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [Work process:](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Asynchronous workflow with project management tools](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [No Boring Design to have access to fwd.digital's project manager and designers](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Felipe to assist with competitive research and strategy formation](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)

### Immediate Next Steps

  - [Schedule kickoff meeting for SEO collaboration next week](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)
  - [Plan separate kickoff for design services](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
  - [Priority: Create pitch deck for No Boring Design's fundraising in January](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1838.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule SEO kickoff meeting for next week (3 PM PST)](https://fathom.video/share/yhoxtxYz8dpoJB2w1z5sD_Fu2oGhqBgv?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)
